message:
feat(fstring): Implement self-documenting expressions (f"{x=}")

Add support for Python 3.8+ f-string debugging syntax where f"{x=}"
outputs "x=42" instead of just "42".

- Modified FStringPart in lexer and AST to use struct with debug_text
- Added = detection in fstring tokenizer
- Updated codegen to prepend debug_text to format output
- Updated all files that reference FStringPart.expr to use .node
